case_title: DOLORES ALFARO VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES

docket_entries.description: REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES (NOW KNOWN AS CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES)

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD AROUND THE FAILURE TO FILE A TIMELY CLAIM. THE GRAVAMEN OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS THAT DEFENDANT WRONGFULLY SEIZED PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY, A TORT RECOVERY, FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF SEEKS DAMAGES FOR THE AMOUNT OF MONEY WRONGFULLY SEIZED; THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO BUT DID NOT FILE A TORT CLAIM WITHIN 6 MONTHS. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD AROUND THE FAILURE TO FILE A TIMELY CLAIM. THE GRAVAMEN OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS THAT DEFENDANT WRONGFULLY SEIZED PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY, A TORT RECOVERY, FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF SEEKS DAMAGES FOR THE AMOUNT OF MONEY WRONGFULLY SEIZED; THEREFORE PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO BUT DID NOT FILE A TORT CLAIM WITHIN 6 MONTHS. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
